raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 2,
    "R1.5": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output identifies the main concept but does not provide a clear reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "No structural feedback is provided.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims is flagged.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers most of the agreed active set with one drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output identifies the main concept but does not provide a clear reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims is flagged.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers most of the agreed active set with one drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
